enchantment.minsenchantments.hardening.d: Increase armor point when taking a damage.
enchantment.minsenchantments.rage.desc: Increase attack damage and speed with each hit.
enchantment.minsenchantments.returning.d: Revive in last death position using durability of armor.
enchantment.minsenchantments.mirror.desc: Grants chance to reflect damage and projectile with shield.
enchantment.minsenchantments.soul_of_ter: Summon extra projectiles upon projectile hit.
enchantment.minsenchantments.malice.desc: While hugely decrease base damage, deal percent damage with max health of enemy.
enchantment.minsenchantments.auto_shield: Grants chance to automatically block attack with shied.
enchantment.minsenchantments.grinding.de: Increase damage, attack and mining speed, projectile damage with consumed durability.
enchantment.minsenchantments.critical_st: Grants chance to convert normal attack to critical hit.
enchantment.minsenchantments.heart_steal: Grants chance to heal upon hit.
enchantment.minsenchantments.healing_cut: Grants chance to reduce enemies healing with duration.
enchantment.minsenchantments.multi_strik: Grants chance to perform second attack.
enchantment.minsenchantments.solaria.des: While under sunlight, slowly recover durability.
Grants chance to stop enemies time with duration.
enchantment.minsenchantments.mermaids_bl: While in water, hostile mobs won't attack you first.
enchantment.minsenchantments.sharp_waves: Increase damage of trident with distance of trident traveled.
enchantment.minsenchantments.tide.desc: While swimming, increase swimming speed constantly.
enchantment.minsenchantments.poseidons_g: On projectile hit, summon additional tridents from nearby water.
enchantment.minsenchantments.waves_prote: When taking a damage in water, increase swimming speed with short amount of time.
enchantment.minsenchantments.lord_of_the: While in water, nearby water animals will fight for you.
enchantment.minsenchantments.water_jet.d: While in water, able to shoot bow using water. while outside water, able to reload crossbow with splash water bottle.
enchantment.minsenchantments.curse_of_me: While in water, netural mobs become hostile.
enchantment.minsenchantments.curse_of_ab: While in water, decrease fov of player.
enchantment.minsenchantments.curse_of_un: While under sunlight, burn like a undead.
enchantment.minsenchantments.rusty.desc: While in water, constantly decrease durability of item.
enchantment.minsenchantments.lava_walker: Allow to walk on surface of lava.
enchantment.minsenchantments.flame_thorn: When taking a damge, deal a thorn damage and put enemy on fire.
enchantment.minsenchantments.teleportati: On projectile hit, teleport shooter to hit location.
Allow to shoot sonic boom instead of arrow.
enchantment.minsenchantments.concealment: Silence most of sounds from player.
enchantment.minsenchantments.magnet.desc: While sneaking, attract nearby items and exp orbs.
enchantment.minsenchantments.takeoff.des: Allow to start flying with elytra in ground.
enchantment.minsenchantments.armor_crack: Increase damage with armor point of enemy.
